name: create_xlsx
description: Creates a formatted Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheet with headers, data rows, auto-width columns, and optional formulas. Returns the file path. You MUST include [FILE:path] in your answer after using this tool.

filename.description: Output filename (without path), e.g. 'dados.xlsx'. Will be saved in ./output/

rows.description: Data rows as array of arrays, e.g. [['João', 25, 'joao@email.com'], ['Maria', 30, 'maria@email.com']]
